summary: Comprehensive testing of FacturePro Iteration 7 features: Trial expiry notification, drag & drop receipt upload, and optional employee field on expenses. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed - expense modal shows optional employee with 'Depense generale' default, drag & drop zone with 'Glissez votre recu ici', receipt upload works, and 'Voir le recu' link appears in expense cards.
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - used existing exempt user for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/subscription/check-trial-expiry (returns {notified, total_eligible}, no auth required). Expense features: employee_id is now optional (empty string for general expenses), expenses without employee show 'Depense generale' in italic. Receipt upload: POST /api/upload returns {file_id, storage_path, filename}, GET /api/files/{file_id} returns file content. Frontend: ExpensesPage.js has drag & drop zone with data-testid='receipt-dropzone', employee select with data-testid='expense-employee-select' defaults to '-- Depense generale --', receipt preview shows with data-testid='receipt-preview', expense cards with receipt show 'Voir le recu' link.

expense_modal_features.drag_drop_zone: PASS - Shows 'Glissez votre recu ici' text
expense_modal_features.receipt_upload: PASS - File upload works, shows preview with filename
expense_modal_features.receipt_remove: PASS - 'Retirer' button available to remove receipt

expense_list_features.general_expense_display: PASS - Expenses without employee show 'Depense generale' in italic
expense_list_features.receipt_link: PASS - Expenses with receipt show 'Voir le recu' link
expense_list_features.receipt_link_accessible: PASS - Receipt link opens file correctly

full_flow_test.create_general_expense: PASS - Can create expense without selecting employee
full_flow_test.create_expense_with_receipt: PASS - Can upload receipt and create expense
full_flow_test.expense_appears_in_list: PASS - Created expenses appear in list correctly

expenses: GET /api/expenses - Returns list of expenses with employee_id (empty for general)
file_upload: POST /api/upload - Uploads file, returns {file_id, storage_path, filename}
GET /api/files/{file_id} - Returns file content with correct content-type
verified_behavior: Trial expiry endpoint returns 0 for notified/total_eligible when no trials expiring in 3 days
Expense without employee_id has empty string for employee_id field
Expense with receipt_url stores the /api/files/{file_id} path
File download endpoint returns 404 for non-existent files
Uploaded files are accessible via GET /api/files/{file_id}

mocked_apis: None - All integrations are real (Resend for email, Object Storage for files)
